title: she.rs: validate_she_block_size uses bare 16 for AES block size
description: validate_she_block_size contains len % 16 != 0 with no named constant. The rest of the file uses SHE_KEY_SZ for the 16-byte key size, but SHE_KEY_SZ is semantically wrong for an AES block size check. A small private constant AES_BLOCK_SZ: usize = 16; (or the equivalent) would make the block-alignment constraint self-documenting and consistent with the aes.rs constants pattern. Without it, a reader must know that 16 is the AES block size rather than a coincidental match with the key size.
